indications.text:
1.1 MRI of the Central Nervous System (CNS)
ProHance is indicated for magnetic resonance imaging (MRI) in adults and pediatric patients including
term neonates to visualize lesions with disrupted blood brain barrier and/or abnormal vascularity in the
brain (intracranial lesions), spine and associate...

8.4 Pediatric Use
1.1 MRI of the Central Nervous System (CNS)
8.5 Geriatric Use
1.2 MRI of Extracranial/Extraspinal Head and Neck
8.6 Renal Impairment

Central Nervous System
ProHance (Gadoteridol) Injection is indicated for use in MRI in adults and children over 2
years of age to visualize lesions with abnormal vascularity in the brain (intracranial lesions),
spine and associated tissues.
